biography: Cassandra Ebner is an international Actress and Stunt Woman. She has worked on TV shows such as Game Of Thrones, Arrow, Flash, The 100 and Once Upon a Time. Some of her film credits consist of Warcraft, Power Rangers, Dead Rising and Monster Trucks. Cassandra is the lead in the Award winning short film Croft and an the TV series DemonX.
name: Cassandra Ebner
